overview: This document defines comprehensive rules for an automated agent that validates and enforces proper file structure and required files across different project types. The agent must scan, validate, and create necessary files based on project type detection and scalability requirements.

projectTypeDetectionAlgorithm: Check for framework indicators (package.json dependencies, config files)
Scan for blockchain artifacts (contracts/, hardhat.config.js, foundry.toml)
Detect monorepo patterns (workspace configurations, multiple package.json)
Identify desktop app frameworks (tauri.conf.json, electron configs)
Analyze scalability tooling (docker files, k8s configs, CI/CD)

webApplicationFrontendOnly.coreRequiredFiles:
project-root/

в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ store/ (if state management)  # State management

frameworkSpecificAdditions.react:
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ src/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ index.js|tsx                # React entry point
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ App.jsx|tsx                 # Main React component
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ hooks/                      # Custom React hooks
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ useCustomHook.js|ts
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ context/                    # React context providers
в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ AppContext.js|tsx
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ jsconfig.json|tsconfig.json     # TypeScript/JavaScript config
в””в”Ђв”Ђ .eslintrc.js                    # ESLint configuration

в”њв”Ђв”Ђ src/

в”њв”Ђв”Ђ vue.config.js                   # Vue CLI configuration
